title: fileset.content Facet
description: Observed managed-file state on a host (charter §1.2: a projection of actual host state; §4.2 'checksum Facets'). Keyed by the FileSet Intent's dot-free `key`; each entry carries the observed sha256 digest, POSIX attributes, and presence. Projected by the fileset collector gather Run (ansible stat + sha256), demanded by the shipping Intent/FileSet Baselines (§1.1). A compiled Baseline observes fileset.content.<key>.digest equals the Intent's expected digest; a mismatch or absence is drift.

digest.description: observed content sha256 (sha256:<hex>), or empty when absent

present.description: whether the file exists on the host
